sentiment.reasoning: Regulatory reviews create immediate uncertainty and potential operational friction for enterprise software companies.

headlines.headline: Zelval Energy misses quarterly revenue estimates by 5%

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
